stem: A scatterplot shows the relationship between the time spent studying, x (in hours), and the test score, y (in points), for 25 students. The data clusters along a line that passes through approximately (2, 70) and (6, 90). Which of the following equations most closely fits the data?
rationale:
Choice A is correct. Slope = (90 − 70)/(6 − 2) = 20/4 = 5. Using y = 5x + b at (2, 70): 70 = 10 + b, so b = 60. The equation is y = 5x + 60.

Choices B and C have the wrong slope. Choice D has the wrong sign.
